name: SpringWoods Villa, 4BHK Triplex
investmentSummary: A sprawling ~4,200 sq.ft three-level 4BHK villa in the gated SpringWoods community off Bannerghatta–Jigani Road, private garden on three sides, second-floor media room, roof terrace and covered parking for two cars.

configurations.label: 4 BHK + Study Villa
configurations.note: Triplex, guest bedroom + study on ground, 3 bedrooms on first floor, media room on second floor, plus a maid's room with attached bath and separate entry.

rera.number: Resale villa in a gated community, clear title; documents verified on request.

description: A beautiful three-level villa in "SpringWoods", a gated private community on Jigani–Anekal Road (past Bannerghatta National Park), opposite Nisarga Layout, Koppa Gate, Bengaluru 560105. The villa sits on a 60x52 plot with approx. 4,200 sq.ft of built-up area, wrapped by a small garden on three sides and surrounded by superb natural greenery. Ground floor offers a sprawling, airy living room, a spacious open kitchen with a large adjoining store room, a huge dining area, a separate temple area, a big guest bedroom, a spacious study, a big common bathroom, a utility area and a separate maid's room with attached bathroom and its own entry. The first floor has a master bedroom with attached bathroom, large walk-in closet and a spacious balcony, two more bedrooms sharing a big common bathroom and walk-in closet, plus a family sit-out and a beautiful large verandah/terrace. The second floor houses a huge media room with a roof terrace. Priced at ₹2.5 Cr, a little negotiable.
whyThisProperty: Ready-to-move triplex villa with ~4,200 sq.ft built-up on a 60x52 plot
Gated private community living with a big operational clubhouse
Private garden wrapping three sides, surrounded by natural greenery
Master bedroom with attached bath, walk-in closet and private balcony
Dedicated second-floor media room plus roof terrace
Full granite staircase with steel railings across all three floors
Overhead and underground (sump) water storage
Covered parking for two big cars
idealFor: Families wanting a spacious independent villa near Bannerghatta
Buyers who prefer ready-to-move over under-construction
End-users valuing gated-community security and greenery
Households needing a maid's room with separate entry
